semantic_description: array_init takes a nonnegative length n and a full integer array a with logical contents l of length n. It runs a single for loop from i = 0 to i < n, overwriting each element a[i] with 0. On return the array is still length n and every index in the valid range contains 0. The empty-loop case n == 0 is allowed and leaves the zero-length array predicate unchanged.
